purpose: Tree-shaking + bundle-size baseline for the evaluator consolidation arc (parser/runtime.ts canonical + ExpressionRegistry).
notes: Updated 2026-05-18 after Phase 3 (runtime classes use registry-driven canonical evaluator). Re-run after each phase via `node scripts/bundle-size-snapshot.mjs --check`. If any bundle moves outside ±tolerance_percent, tree-shaking has regressed. Phase 3 added ~4-5 KB gzip to minimal/standard (parser/runtime.ts evaluator dispatcher now in the bundle); category-module tree-shaking still works (verified via grep of dist).

hyperfixi-minimal.js.evaluator_strategy: createCoreRegistry (3 of 7 categories: references, logical, special) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi-standard.js.evaluator_strategy: createCommonRegistry (5 of 7 categories) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator
